[[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] '''Phoebe''' was a [[Hiromi]] officer on the ''[[Kuratcha]]'' during [[Operation: Glorious Destiny]]. The ensign was placed inside a party held by the king and queen of [[Zeltros/Legends|Zeltros]] as a spy.

{{Char-stub}}
